calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessica Danielski of Hunt & Henriques telephone number 408-414-0365 for Plaintiff Citibank.
Defendant Laura Larsen telephone number 415-664-3044 in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Defendant Laura Larsen's Claim of Exemption is granted in full. Funds held by the Levying Officer are to be returned to Ms. Larsen. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
